user_query:
I'm coordinating several grassroots chapters and need a clean, validated action plan I can share with local leads. Using the provided local files input/chapters.csv and input/actions.csv alongside the validator script tools/validate_actions.py, please do the following:

1) Run the validator as a command-line program on the actions file and capture its outputs verbatim:
   - Command: python3 tools/validate_actions.py input/actions.csv
   - Save all stdout from the command to output/validator_raw.log. Also record the command exit code at the end of the log on a separate line in the form: EXIT_CODE=<number>.
   - Even if the validator exits with a non-zero code, continue the workflow. Treat any lines starting with "ERROR:" as blockers to exclude from the plan, and lines starting with "WARNING:" as non-blockers to include but flag.

2) Produce a chapter-aligned plan by joining actions to chapters and applying the following rules:
   - Join input/actions.csv to input/chapters.csv on chapter_id to add the chapter_name column. Any action referencing a chapter_id that does not exist in input/chapters.csv must be excluded from the plan and listed as an orphan issue.
   - Apply validator guidance: exclude any action rows that the validator reported as ERRORs; include rows that were only WARNINGs, normalizing values as follows: for any unrecognized or missing priority, set to "medium"; for any unrecognized or missing status, set to "planned".
   - The output plan must be written to output/sync_plan.csv with the exact columns and order: action_id,chapter_id,chapter_name,action_title,priority,status.
   - Sort output/sync_plan.csv by chapter_name ascending, then action_id ascending.

3) Generate an issue summary file at output/issues.json with this structure:
   - validator_exit_code: integer exit code from the validator run.
   - errors: list of objects for each validator ERROR with keys {action_id, row, message}, where message is the full text of the corresponding validator line (without trailing newline) and row is the row number reported by the validator.
   - warnings_included: list of objects for each validator WARNING that corresponds to an action included in the plan (same fields as errors).
   - orphans: list of objects with keys {action_id, chapter_id} for actions excluded because their chapter_id was not found in input/chapters.csv.

Constraints:
- Do not modify the input files.
- The three output artifacts must be created under the output/ directory exactly as named: output/validator_raw.log, output/sync_plan.csv, output/issues.json.
- Base the error/warning details in issues.json on the actual validator command output you captured, not on re-computation.

Deliverables are intended to help my team synchronize across chapters and quickly isolate any data quality problems before a planning call. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
